topic: Systemic Project-Product Analysis Process — Two-Lane Diagnostic (Build Truth + World Interface)
content_preview: Defines a reusable analysis process for evaluating any project/product across two parallel lanes: Lane A (The Thing Itself — build quality, architecture, UX, defensibility) and Lane B (The Thing In The World — positioning, discovery, monetization, community fit). Includes 6-phase cycle, 14-dimension scorecard, diagnostic methods, mechanism ledger, monetization integrity tests, and portfolio-level operations.
